### Type of change

### Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the PARA conventions
- [ ] I have run `bash tests/kernel/test-schemas.sh` and it passes
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] If changing kernel invariants: RFC is linked → `rfcs/proposed/XXXX-*.md`
